sources.supports: 340% average ROI over 18 months; $34K legal team implementation with 4-month payback; $3.70 ROI per $1 on hallucination prevention

sources.supports: Comparative pricing across major vector DBs; Qdrant 3x cheaper than Pinecone on comparable workloads

sources.title: RAG & Copyright: EUIPO Clarification on Temporary Storage Exception
sources.supports: Legal: RAG classified as temporary storage (not training ingestion) under EU copyright law; technical implementation determines compliance

sources.supports: 2026 data sovereignty regulations; EU AI Act 7% global revenue penalty ceiling; sovereign cloud RAG requirements

sources.supports: Milvus 40K+ GitHub stars; enterprise deployments at NVIDIA, Salesforce, eBay, Airbnb, DoorDash

sources.title: Best Open-Source RAG Frameworks in 2026 — LangChain, LlamaIndex Ecosystem

sources.title: What is GraphRAG? Complete Guide 2026 — Microsoft, Latency, Use Cases
sources.supports: GraphRAG 20-24s response time; unsuitable for interactive use; development timeline April 2024 → December 2024 GA

sources.title: Hybrid Search for RAG: Combining BM25 and Dense Vector — 7-31% Recall Improvement
sources.supports: Hybrid search NDCG improvement: 7.4% on e-commerce; 0.816 Recall@5 on financial documents; hybrid + neural reranking performance benchmarks

sources.title: The Hidden Costs of RAG in Production — Vector DB, Reranking, Latency 2026
sources.supports: Production RAG hidden costs; index rebuild costs; HNSW storage overhead; data prep consuming 30-50% of RAG project budgets

sources.title: LangChain Wikipedia — History, Launch Timeline, Community Growth
sources.supports: LangChain October 2022 launch timeline; 800-line initial package; 50K GitHub stars milestone vs TensorFlow comparison

notes: All source URLs verified as accessible as of research date. Market size figures vary by research firm methodology; Fortune Business Insights, MarketsandMarkets, and Precedence Research figures used as primary triangulation. Adoption percentages (67% Fortune 500) sourced from AI Log enterprise study — treat as directionally accurate industry survey rather than census data. Pricing figures reflect Q1-Q2 2026 listed rates; actual enterprise contracts typically negotiated at 20-40% discount from list price.
